title: Styloglossum stella

The classification of Styloglossum stella is further broken down into the subfamily Epidendroideae, which is a subfamily of the orchid family. Styloglossum stella is native to Australia, where it grows as an epiphyte or lithophyte. The species is recognized for its unique and distinctive appearance, with a white lip and yellowish-green flowers.
